rationale: In the citing paper, Plassmann et al. (2015) appears only in grouped background citations supporting broad points about consumer neuroscience (as a complement to self-report, its growth, and interpretability challenges). The citing article does not give this specific paper a distinct functional role in hypothesis development, construct definition, or empirical design. Its core analytic approach is operationalized and tied more directly to technical sources on Neurosynth and decoding methods.
